meta.title: Stuttgart 3-2 Young Boys (29 Jan, 2026) Final Score - ESPN (UK)
meta.description: Game summary of the VfB Stuttgart vs. Young Boys Uefa Europa League game, final score 3-2, from 29 January 2026 on ESPN (UK).

articles.headline: Are PSG suffering from a Club World Cup hangover?
articles.description: Mark Ogden discusses PSG's chances of retaining the Champions League.

images.alt: Are PSG suffering from a Club World Cup hangover?

articles.headline: Europa League draw: Aston Villa vs. Lille, Nottingham Forest vs. Midtjylland
articles.description: Aston Villa will face Lille in the last 16 of the Europa League and Nottingham Forest have been drawn against Midtjylland.

images.alt: Europa League draw: Aston Villa vs. Lille, Nottingham Forest vs. Midtjylland

articles.headline: Nottingham Forest survive Fenerbahce rally to secure last 16 spot
articles.description: Nottingham Forest survived a scare against Fenerbahce in the Europa League playoff second leg as they booked their place in the last 16 with a 4-2 aggregate win.

images.alt: Nottingham Forest survive Fenerbahce rally to secure last 16 spot

allCommentary.dtls: Match ends, VfB Stuttgart 3, Young Boys 2.
Atakan Karazor (VfB Stuttgart) is shown the yellow card.
Second Half ends, VfB Stuttgart 3, Young Boys 2.

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! VfB Stuttgart 1, Young Boys 0. Deniz Undav (VfB Stuttgart) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lorenz Assignon with a cross.
Goal! VfB Stuttgart 2, Young Boys 0. Ermedin Demirovic (VfB Stuttgart) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Deniz Undav with a through ball.
Joël Monteiro (Young Boys) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! VfB Stuttgart 2, Young Boys 1. Armin Gigovic (Young Boys) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Gregory Wüthrich.
First Half ends, VfB Stuttgart 2, Young Boys 1.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: First Half ends, VfB Stuttgart 2, Young Boys 1.

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! VfB Stuttgart 2, Young Boys 2. Sandro Lauper (Young Boys) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Edimilson Fernandes with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Young Boys. Sergio Córdova replaces Chris Bedia.
keyEvents.shrtDtls: On: Sergio Córdova | Off: Chris Bedia

keyEvents.dtls: Goal! VfB Stuttgart 3, Young Boys 2. Chema Andres (VfB Stuttgart) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Jamie Leweling with a cross following a fast break.
Atakan Karazor (VfB Stuttgart) is shown the yellow card.
